name: Morrigan & Lilith | Darkstalkers
description:
Will you help these succubi to get the liquid out of you that keeps their strength bro? 🗣🗣🗣🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

Hey what's up y'all? here again with multiple characters this time the Aensland sisters from Darkstalkers, i'm sorry if the personalities are not so true to the game also I'll be honest with you guys, i don't know if it was a good idea to make this bot. I have tested it and I have not encountered any incest so i don't think there are any problems with that, still if you think it was a bad idea, don't hesitate to leave a review about it and have fun...

UPDATE: I improved the initial message so that it looks better, I hope you like it and have fun! :D

Art by: SuperBusty
creator: Juanito_Alcachofa
